rules.name: Stance
rules.description: An ability with stance gains different effects on odd, even, or special numbered rounds.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: A unit affected by a Miracle has a 5+ effect chance to instantly return to life at 1 hp at the end of any turn it is slain, clearing all tokens.

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: Self and allies in the area may convert any number of vitality to strength.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Remove all negative tokens on an ally, then transfer to self. That ally gains 1 vitality per negative token removed and becomes curseproof until the start of its next turn

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Gain 1 vitality. Until end of next turn, self and adjacent allies may spend this unit’s hp as if it were vitality tokens.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Until end of next turn, foes ending their turn in range 2 of this unit have a hazard created under them, then are pushed 1.

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 holy damage and splash (target): 1 holy damage. Stance (Round 3+): and create a hazard under target (round 5+) all targets in the area.

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 2 damage. Stance: May step spaces equal to the round number with free movement, in a straight line, before the attack. On hit, push target half that any spaces.

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Stance: Roll the effect die. If you roll under the round number, deal 1 holy damage again. If you roll exactly the round number, deal 2 holy damage again instead.

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: A unit MOVEs, and that move resolves.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: Step spaces equal to 1 + the round number, then push an adjacent unit 1.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: Step 1, then cut a line area with spaces equal to the round number +2, dealing 1 damage to all characters within and pushing those characters 1. Stance (R5+): This damage becomes Devil Damage.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Unit becomes curseproof until end of its next turn and attacks against it gain -1D for the duration.

characteristics.name: Trigger
characteristics.$text: This unit takes damage from an ACT ability, and that ability resolves

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): remove 1 negative token on self or gain 1 vitality for every foe in the splash area. Stance (R4+): both effects trigger.

sharedProfiles.name: Supreme Sword Art: Merciful Snowdrop Cut

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Splash (self): 1 holy damage. Stance (R3+): 2 holy damage (R5+): 4 holy damage. (R6+): 5 holy damage.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Return unit to life at 1 hp at the end of the turn. It becomes immune to all damage and curseproof until the start of its next turn. Stance (R3+) and it gains 1 vitality (R5+) 3 vitality instead.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: 1 damage. Stance (Odd): and step 2, Stance (Even): and gain 1 vitality, Stance (Round 5+): Increase damage to 3.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Lacks Miracle. However, while alive, miracle triggers for adjacent allies on a 4+, and gain 1 SOUL the first time it triggers in a round.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Self takes 1 piercing damage, which cannot slay self. One allied unit in range gains one, (3+) two, or (5+) three vitality.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: For this turn only, self or allied unit in range may treat the current round number as either 2 or 5.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: (Round 3+): Attacks cannot miss (all misses turn into hits).

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Stance: (Round 3+): Gain either physical or magical armor (choose).
